info.title: MealOS Web API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the MealOS web application API.

example: includeTimestamp: Invalid option: expected one of "true"|"false"
page: Too small: expected number to be >0

message.example: You can only access your own profile.

example: name: Too small: expected string to have >=1 characters
page: Too small: expected number to be >0
name: Too small: expected string to have >=1 characters

description.example: Simple pasta with garlic, olive oil, and chili flakes.
Simple pasta with garlic, olive oil, and chili flakes.

example: page: Too small: expected number to be >0

description.example: Simple pasta with garlic, olive oil, and chili flakes.
Simple pasta with garlic, olive oil, and chili flakes.

get.description: Returns the basic status of the web application.

schema.description: Set to true to include a timestamp in the response.

parameters.description: Set to true to include a timestamp in the response.
parameters.name: includeTimestamp

400.description: The request query parameters were invalid.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of ingredients with aliases, category, and default unit details.

schema.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across ingredient names and aliases.

parameters.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across ingredient names and aliases.
parameters.name: searchTerm

schema.description: The number of ingredients to return per page.

parameters.description: The number of ingredients to return per page.
parameters.name: pageSize

403.description: The authenticated user cannot access this profile.

post.description: Creates a custom ingredient for the authenticated user.

Location.description: Location of the created user ingredient resource.

get.description: Lists paginated user ingredients created by the authenticated user.

schema.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across user ingredient names.

parameters.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across user ingredient names.
parameters.name: searchTerm

schema.description: The number of user ingredients to return per page.

parameters.description: The number of user ingredients to return per page.
parameters.name: pageSize

200.description: Paginated user ingredients created by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a user ingredient visible to the authenticated user.

404.description: The user ingredient does not exist or is not visible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a recipe for the authenticated user.

Location.description: Location of the created recipe resource.

get.description: Lists paginated recipe metadata visible to the authenticated user.

schema.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across recipe names.

parameters.description: A fuzzy, case-insensitive search across recipe names.
parameters.name: searchTerm

schema.description: The number of recipes to return per page.

parameters.description: The number of recipes to return per page.
parameters.name: pageSize

200.description: Paginated recipes visible to the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a recipe visible to the authenticated user.

404.description: The recipe does not exist or is not visible to the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates a recipe owned by the authenticated user.

400.description: The route parameters or request body were invalid.

404.description: The recipe does not exist or is not owned by the authenticated user.
